body:0003.source: Managing project input is essential to maintain quality and trust. Project managers and admins handle updates manually, while the platform also provides automated notifications.
body:0003.target: Managing project input is essential to maintain quality and trust. Project managers and admins handle updates manually, while the platform also provides automated notifications.

body:0005.source: Assigning the right project managers to distribute responsibilities
body:0005.target: Assigning the right project managers to distribute responsibilities

body:0006.source: Keeping participants informed by updating content with text, PDFs, images, or videos
body:0006.target: Keeping participants informed by updating content with text, PDFs, images, or videos

body:0007.source: Actively taking part in discussions with comments, statuses, and tags
body:0007.target: Actively taking part in discussions with comments, statuses, and tags

body:0008.source: Moderating inappropriate content such as spam or profanity
body:0008.target: Moderating inappropriate content such as spam or profanity

body:0009.source: Assigning ideas internally to colleagues for collaboration
body:0009.target: Assigning ideas internally to colleagues for collaboration

body:0010.source: 💡 Create a shared admin or project manager profile (e.g., communication@...) to simplify collaboration among colleagues
body:0010.target: 💡 Create a shared admin or project manager profile (e.g., communication@...) to simplify collaboration among colleagues

body:0011.source: Managing the status of the input
body:0011.target: Managing the status of the input

body:0012.source: As an admin or project manager, you can easily update the status of an idea. When you change a status, the author and anyone who has commented on or voted for that idea will automatically receive a notification.
body:0012.target: As an admin or project manager, you can easily update the status of an idea. When you change a status, the author and anyone who has commented on or voted for that idea will automatically receive a notification.

body:0013.source: The platform includes a set of default statuses, but you can also create your own. Just contact us at support@govocal.com with the list of statuses you’d like to use and their preferred colours, and we’ll set them up for you.
body:0013.target: The platform includes a set of default statuses, but you can also create your own. Just contact us at support@govocal.com with the list of statuses you’d like to use and their preferred colours, and we’ll set them up for you.

body:0014.source:
Examples of custom statuses:
​Under consideration, Seen by project manager, To be completed, Not an idea, Needs more explanation, or even placeholders like Status 1, Status 2, etc. Feel free to be creative, statuses are a great communication tool, as they’re visible on the platform and help keep participants informed about progress.
body:0014.target:
Examples of custom statuses:
​Under consideration, Seen by project manager, To be completed, Not an idea, Needs more explanation, or even placeholders like Status 1, Status 2, etc. Feel free to be creative, statuses are a great communication tool, as they’re visible on the platform and help keep participants informed about progress.

body:0015.source: ℹ️ Ideas are always immediately visible in the timeline phase where they were submitted, you can move them between phases and projects, read more about this in our support article.
body:0015.target: ℹ️ Ideas are always immediately visible in the timeline phase where they were submitted, you can move them between phases and projects, read more about this in our support article.

body:0017.source: Bulk official feedback allows admins to add official updates and change the status of many ideas at once by using a structured Excel sheet.
body:0017.target: Bulk official feedback allows admins to add official updates and change the status of many ideas at once by using a structured Excel sheet.

body:0019.source: You need to give the community updates on a large number of ideas at once.
body:0019.target: You need to give the community updates on a large number of ideas at once.

body:0020.source: You want to change multiple ideas’ statuses in a single action.
body:0020.target: You want to change multiple ideas’ statuses in a single action.

body:0021.source: Instead of updating each idea manually, you send a filled‑out template Excel file to support, and the team imports the updates for you.
body:0021.target: Instead of updating each idea manually, you send a filled‑out template Excel file to support, and the team imports the updates for you.

body:0022.source: How to bulk update ideas with official feedback is described below.
body:0022.target: How to bulk update ideas with official feedback is described below.

body:0023.source: How to track and provide official feedback on inputs?
body:0023.target: How to track and provide official feedback on inputs?

body:0024.source: 1. Find inputs that need your attention
body:0024.target: 1. Find inputs that need your attention

body:0027.source: View ideas assigned to you, or
body:0027.target: View ideas assigned to you, or

body:0028.source: Filter by another colleague to check their assignments.
body:0028.target: Filter by another colleague to check their assignments.

body:0029.source: Toggle Only show posts that need feedback
body:0029.target: Toggle Only show posts that need feedback

body:0030.source: A red badge indicates how many inputs (ideas or proposals) still need feedback.
body:0030.target: A red badge indicates how many inputs (ideas or proposals) still need feedback.

body:0032.source: You can give official feedback by changing the status of the input or by adding it manually.
body:0032.target: You can give official feedback by changing the status of the input or by adding it manually.

body:0033.source: Give official feedback by changing the status
body:0033.target: Give official feedback by changing the status

body:0034.source: Change the item’s status (e.g. Proposed → Under Review)
body:0034.target: Change the item’s status (e.g. Proposed → Under Review)

body:0035.source: Leave an official comment explaining the status change or giving feedback
body:0035.target: Leave an official comment explaining the status change or giving feedback

body:0036.source: This keeps participants informed and shows visible progress on the platform
body:0036.target: This keeps participants informed and shows visible progress on the platform

body:0038.source: open the input you wish to give feedback
body:0038.target: open the input you wish to give feedback

body:0039.source: there will be a red box that allows you to give official feedback - when submitted it will appear also in red for the user
body:0039.target: there will be a red box that allows you to give official feedback - when submitted it will appear also in red for the user

body:0040.source: 3. Stay on top of assigned work
body:0040.target: 3. Stay on top of assigned work

body:0041.source: All admins and project managers receive a weekly email reminder listing:
body:0041.target: All admins and project managers receive a weekly email reminder listing:

body:0044.source: Note: Items remain on your list until official feedback is provided (changing status or commenting).
body:0044.target: Note: Items remain on your list until official feedback is provided (changing status or commenting).

body:0046.source: Assign project managers: distribute management responsibilities. (Visible to participants)
body:0046.target: Assign project managers: distribute management responsibilities. (Visible to participants)

body:0047.source: Keep participants up-to-date: update content, add PDFs, images, or videos. (Visible to participants)
body:0047.target: Keep participants up-to-date: update content, add PDFs, images, or videos. (Visible to participants)

body:0048.source: Take part in discussions: use comments, feedback, statuses, and tags. (Visible to participants)
body:0048.target: Take part in discussions: use comments, feedback, statuses, and tags. (Visible to participants)

body:0049.source: Moderate inappropriate content: handle spam, delete posts, or remove profanity. (Not visible to participants)
body:0049.target: Moderate inappropriate content: handle spam, delete posts, or remove profanity. (Not visible to participants)

body:0050.source: Assign ideas internally: collaborate by assigning inputs to colleagues. (Not visible to participants)
body:0050.target: Assign ideas internally: collaborate by assigning inputs to colleagues. (Not visible to participants)

body:0051.source: How to bulk update ideas with official feedback?
body:0051.target: How to bulk update ideas with official feedback?

body:0053.source: Export all ideas you want to comment on or update.
body:0053.target: Export all ideas you want to comment on or update.

body:0055.source: Copy all IDs (column A in your export) into column A (“ID”) of the provided Excel template.
body:0055.target: Copy all IDs (column A in your export) into column A (“ID”) of the provided Excel template.

body:0056.source: [Include link or reference to download the template Excel sheet.]
body:0056.target: [Include link or reference to download the template Excel sheet.]

body:0059.source: Shown publicly on the platform (e.g. “Team Mobility – City of Nanaimo”).
body:0059.target: Shown publicly on the platform (e.g. “Team Mobility – City of Nanaimo”).

body:0060.source: Does not have to be a registered user.
body:0060.target: Does not have to be a registered user.

body:0062.source: Not shown publicly. Must be the email of a registered admin on the platform.
body:0062.target: Not shown publicly. Must be the email of a registered admin on the platform.

body:0064.source: The text of the official update. You can personalize with ####{{first_name}} to auto‑insert the participant's first name.
body:0064.target: The text of the official update. You can personalize with ####{{first_name}} to auto‑insert the participant's first name.

body:0066.source: If you want to change the status, type the exact status name as it appears on your platform.
body:0066.target: If you want to change the status, type the exact status name as it appears on your platform.

body:0068.source: Used when the participant deleted their account, so a placeholder name can appear instead of leaving it blank.
body:0068.target: Used when the participant deleted their account, so a placeholder name can appear instead of leaving it blank.

body:0070.source: Email the filled template to support@govocal.com
body:0070.target: Email the filled template to support@govocal.com

body:0071.source: Include the exact day and time you want the updates applied
body:0071.target: Include the exact day and time you want the updates applied

body:0072.source: Allow 10 working days for the task to be scheduled
body:0072.target: Allow 10 working days for the task to be scheduled
